name: Embedding Model Registry
description: A deterministic registry tool to register embedding models and list configured embedding models for retrieval maintenance.

inputSchema.name: Provider Key
inputSchema.description: Model provider key, for example local-hash, local, openai, or openrouter.

inputSchema.name: Distance Metric
inputSchema.description: Embedding distance metric. The current supported value is cosine.

inputSchema.name: Enabled
inputSchema.description: Whether memory writes should queue jobs for this embedding model.

inputSchema.name: Enabled Only
inputSchema.description: When listing models, include only enabled models.

outputSchema.name: Error
outputSchema.description: Error detail when the operation fails.

zh-CN.name: 嵌入模型注册器
zh-CN.description: 注册或列出检索维护使用的嵌入模型，用于让图明确选择 provider、模型、向量维度、距离度量和启用状态。

en-US.name: Embedding Model Registry
en-US.description: Registers and lists embedding models used by retrieval maintenance, including provider, model, dimensions, distance metric, and enabled state.
